prayer: Blessed servo-chain, awake from stasis. By the Omnissiah's mercy, let friction yield to motion. Sanctify the rollers and bearings, that cargo may flow eternal.

prompt: Emergency rite for autocannon barrel cooling
prayer: Coolant-spirits, descend upon the heat-wrought metal. Let the sacred fluids quench the flame-rage. By iron will, let temperature surrender.
O lodestone-heart, align to the true north of the Omnissiah. Let magnetic essence bind true, that direction be forever known.

prompt: Emergency rite for Rhino APC ignition
prayer: Promethean engine-spirit, wake! Fuel flows, ignition-plugs glow. By starter-servo's turn, let combustion roar to blessed life.
Diesel-heart, stir from dormancy. Let compression and flame converge in holy union. Rise, blessed transport, that the Mechanicus may advance.
Needle-spirit, find thy sacred null-point. Let calibration restore thy truth-speaking voice, that pressure be measured in the Omnissiah's sight.
From the Litany of Accuracy: Let the gauge-spirit be zeroed in silence. Balance the mechanical heart against the void-standard, that all readings be blessed.
Anti-gravity essence, coalesce and hold. By the Omnissiah's anchoring will, let mass-reversal remain stable. Shield the singularity-heart from discord.
Auspex-spirit, cast thy blessed rays outward. Let no threat escape thy vigilant gaze. By electromagnetic grace, perceive all that approaches.
Signal-veil, strengthen thy obscuring shroud. Let noise and chaos confound the enemy's reach. By the Omnissiah's cryptic will, remain unbroken.
